compliance_notes: The project has a CycloneDX SBOM, but it is recommended to also provide SPDX compliance
summary: The esp32c3 project has a security score of 0 due to exposed API keys and a mutable Docker tag. Immediate action is required to rotate the API keys and pin the Docker image to a specific digest. The project has a good foundation with SLSA provenance hashes available, but can improve with additional compliance and security measures.
